form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 9th (Fr3) over 1177m at Pinjarra, beaten 19 m by Hes A Cool Mach (1:24.70) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $9.50. form.formComment: Finished eighth at her last two starts since resuming from a spell. Last outing was beaten 12 metres behind Akabah at Pinjarra over 1177m NR up to 55 on March 30. Should be at peak fitness and can turn things around.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 7th (Fr5) over 1780m after being wide early at Northam, beaten 12 m by Ciao Babe (2:13.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 20 at $2.75. At the previous start 7th (Fr5) over 1730m at this track beaten 8 m by Siangdi (2:08.00) in 4yo+ 0W/17K stake on January 30 at $18. Better than last start and can improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Race keenly through the early stages after successfully finding the lead.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth after being driven well back, behind Allizee at Bunbury over 1609m in a 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 28 at $8. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr4) over 1780m after racing wide at Northam beaten 2.25 m by Hot Cinder (2:11.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 20 at $5. Ready to make amends.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing third behind Dat Lovely at this track over 1730m in a 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 24 at $21. Continues to race well and sure to go well.
